commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Baileys-compatible WebSocket endpoint for the WhatsApp fake provider, removes the older WhatsApp socket-factory export, and updates docs, tests, and package dependencies.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source and diff inspection show the public subpath removal and the missing replacement for admin-inbound delivery to Baileys listeners. No runtime command was executed because this is a read-only PR review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is maintainer-authored and now has both product or upgrade decisions and concrete code blockers, so maintainers should decide whether to repair this branch or split the migration before automation attempts a replacement.
